canonical_definition: Medical consultation dataset containing single-turn patient queries paired with licensed professional responses, used for in-distribution evaluation of medical QA systems.
papers: Quantized but Deceptive? A Multi-Dimensional Truthfulness Evaluation of QuantizedLLMs

definitions.text: A publicly available dataset of de-identified, user-submitted medical consultation questions used for academic research and model evaluation.
